data.title: Gold Mining Stocks Surge Amid Rising Gold Prices
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the standout performer in the U.S. stock market this year has been the gold mining sector, rather than AI or Bitcoin-related stocks. With gold prices soaring by 52% since January and recently surpassing $4,000 per ounce, gold mining stocks have experienced a remarkable rally. The S&P Global Gold Mining Index has surged by 129% this year, significantly outperforming technology stocks and cryptocurrencies. Major companies like Newmont and Barrick have seen their stock prices double, emerging as the biggest winners in the market.

The success of gold mining stocks is attributed to the profit leverage effect brought about by rising gold prices. For gold mining companies, fixed costs remain unchanged, and the additional revenue from higher gold prices can almost entirely translate into pure profit, resulting in abundant cash flow. However, seasoned investors remain cautious about the potential recurrence of the 2011 gold bubble, expressing concerns over excessive mergers and acquisitions and inflated executive compensation.

Analysts from BiyaPay highlight that the success of the gold mining industry reaffirms the investment logic of 'value return,' especially amid increasing global economic uncertainty. The demand for gold as a safe-haven asset continues to rise. BiyaPay, a platform supporting zero-fee digital currency and USDT trading for U.S. and Hong Kong stock investments, not only offers gold futures trading but also assists investors in efficiently managing diversified asset portfolios globally. As gold mining stocks and traditional assets experience a resurgence, BiyaPay aims to provide users with more financial investment opportunities, helping them achieve wealth growth in a complex market environment.

data.title: Greeks.live: The English community is strongly bullish on BTC, and ETH staking dynamics are causing significant systemic risks
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, released a briefing stating that the Greeks.live English community has shown a clear bullish stance on BTC, with strong confidence in the $122,000 support level. Most traders are actively selling put options, anticipating a new all-time high. Furthermore, the ETH market is experiencing significant systemic risk due to staking dynamics. The unstaked queue has exceeded $10 billion, with wait times exceeding 41 days, while exchange liquidity has fallen to a historic low of 2.83 million ETH. Staking ETH ETFs face a potential liquidity mismatch between traditional financial settlement cycles and ETH unstacking timeframes. Furthermore, DATCO removes over 400,000 ETH from circulation each month, creating significant scarcity and potentially driving ETH's realized volatility higher relative to BTC.

data.title: Coinbase to Launch New Self-Custodial Wallet, Base App
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced in a post on X that Coinbase will launch a new self-custodial wallet, the Base App, later this year, which will be open to everyone. Self-custody and DeFi are key components of Coinbase's economic freedom strategy.

data.title: Hyperliquid to launch DEX-based live streaming platform "Based Streams"
data.description: Hyperliquid today launched Based Streams, a livestreaming platform designed to integrate creator content with real-time transactional interaction. The platform launched at 8:30 PM Beijing Time on October 10th, with the first livestreamer opening 500 blind boxes. Based Streams uses the Hypercore protocol to enable creators to broadcast live video, interact with viewers, and showcase on-chain transaction activity. Viewers can also donate tokens to the streamers and earn "Based Gold" by watching their livestreams. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch Pre-Market Trading for MONUSDT Perpetual Contracts With Up to 5x Leverage
data.description: Binance announced that its Futures platform will launch pre-market trading for MONUSDT perpetual contracts on October 10, 2025, at 15:15 (GMT+8).The new listing will support up to 5x leverage, giving traders early exposure to MON’s price movements and liquidity ahead of full market activation.Pre-market perpetual trading on Binance allows verified users to buy and sell contracts before the official market opens, providing price discovery opportunities and enabling hedging strategies for institutional and retail traders.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Faces Significant Losses in Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, recent monitoring by HyperInsight reveals that within the past five hours, the address labeled as Abraxas Capital (0x5b5d) has been consistently liquidating Bitcoin positions. As of 18:00 UTC+8, the entity has reduced its holdings by 171 BTC, incurring an unrealized loss of $23.91 million. Additionally, a subsidiary address of Abraxas Capital (0xb83d) has mirrored the main address's actions, selling off 83 BTC and experiencing an unrealized loss of $9.66 million.

data.title: State Street Report: 60% of Institutional Investors Plan to Boost Digital Asset Allocation Within a Year
data.description: Key Takeaways:State Street’s 2025 Digital Asset Outlook found that 60% of institutional investors plan to increase their digital asset exposure over the next 12 months.More than half expect their digital asset allocations to double within three years, highlighting accelerating institutional adoption.Tokenized private markets—particularly private equity and fixed income—are viewed as the first major wave of blockchain integration.By 2030, a majority of respondents expect 10–24% of portfolios to be tokenized.Transparency and cost efficiency remain the top drivers, with nearly half anticipating 40% cost savings through blockchain-based infrastructure.Institutional Interest in Digital Assets Surges, Says State StreetAccording to State Street’s 2025 Digital Asset Outlook, institutional investors are rapidly expanding their exposure to cryptocurrencies and tokenized assets.The report, released on October 9 and cited by TechFlow, revealed that six in ten institutional investors plan to increase digital asset allocations within the next year, while over half expect to double their exposure in three years.This marks one of the strongest signals yet that digital assets are becoming a core part of institutional portfolio strategies, particularly as regulatory clarity improves and tokenization technology matures.Tokenized Private Markets Lead the Next Wave of AdoptionThe report identifies tokenized private markets as the primary frontier for blockchain adoption. Investors believe private equity and fixed income markets will be the first to benefit from tokenization, enabling faster settlement, greater transparency, and improved liquidity for traditionally illiquid assets.By 2030, most respondents expect 10% to 24% of their portfolios to be fully tokenized, underscoring the scale of digital transformation underway across global capital markets.Efficiency and Transparency Drive AdoptionState Street’s survey found that transparency and operational efficiency are the leading motivations behind tokenization initiatives.Over 50% of investors cited enhanced asset visibility as a key benefit.Nearly half said they expect to cut operational costs by 40% or more through blockchain-based infrastructure.40% of institutions have already set up dedicated digital asset teams or departments, signaling deep organizational commitment.Institutional Integration AcceleratesThe findings align with a broader industry trend toward institutional-grade digital infrastructure, including custody solutions, tokenization platforms, and regulated blockchain networks.As global asset managers, including State Street, Fidelity, and BlackRock, expand into tokenized funds and stablecoin-based settlement, institutional digital adoption is expected to accelerate sharply through 2026.

data.title: South Korea Intensifies Efforts to Combat Tax Evasion in Cryptocurrency
data.description:
According to PANews, South Korea's National Tax Service is intensifying its efforts to combat tax evasion, warning that cryptocurrency assets stored in cold wallets may also be subject to seizure. Officials have stated that if there is suspicion of tax evaders hiding crypto assets offline, they will conduct home searches and confiscate hard drives and cold wallet devices. Under the National Tax Collection Act, the tax authority can request account information from local exchanges, freeze accounts, and liquidate assets to cover tax liabilities.

While cold wallets provide security for cryptocurrency assets, they can also be used to conceal assets, complicating tax collection efforts. As of June, the number of cryptocurrency investors in South Korea has reached nearly 11 million, marking an increase of almost 800% since 2020. During the same period, trading volume surged from 1 trillion won (approximately $730 million) to 6.4 trillion won (around $4.7 billion).

The widespread adoption of cryptocurrencies has led to an increase in tax evasion cases. In 2021, the first operation resulted in the seizure of approximately $50 million in cryptocurrencies, and over the past four years, $108 million has been seized and liquidated.

data.title: Democrats Propose ‘Restricted List’ for DeFi Protocols in Bill That Could ‘Kill’ Sector
data.description:
Senate Democrats sent Republicans a counter-proposal permitting Treasury to create a restricted list for DeFi protocols with Know Your Customer rules on crypto frontends, triggering immediate halt to bipartisan negotiations as industry leaders warn it could push innovation offshore.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/democrats-propose-restricted-list-for-defi-protocols-in-bill-that-could-kill-sector/

data.title: GMGN: Some tokens on the BSC FLAP Launchpad have contract risks
data.description: GMGN announced on the X platform that the team has received user feedback regarding potential contractual risks with some tokens listed on the BSC FLAP Launchpad. These tokens are configured with dynamic tax rates, which in some cases can result in a 100% sell tax, making them unsaleable. For users who haven't manually set any filters, FLAP has been removed from the default filter. All traders of meme tokens issued through FLAP are urged to exercise caution and be aware of potential trading risks.
